who: home services contractors processing 5–15 insurance claims/month
offer: For home services contractors processing 5–15 insurance claims/month, inefficient filing causes delayed payments. We streamline the claim filing process instead of manual claim filing processes.
problem: Inefficient filing of insurance claims leads to delayed payments.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for home services contractors
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to contractors with demo video
Share insights in community forums for contractors
try_it: Let users try simple claim submission form and status tracking for claims on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
